since_last: 69% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.32% · BTC +1.00% · Gold +1.54% · Nasdaq100 +1.03%. 69% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.10%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.46%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.75%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.75%, SYNA +9.07%, AMD +7.20%, CEVA +7.20%, AMAT +7.09%. Laggards: AVAV -5.28%, PLTR -4.89%, SOUN -4.49%, IBM -2.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.59% at $149.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
